2605.07357.title: GraphReAct: Reasoning and Acting for Multi-step Graph Inference
2605.07357.paper_summary: Reasoning-acting frameworks enhance large language models (LLMs) by interleaving reasoning with actions for dynamic information acquisition. However, extending this paradigm to graph learning remains underexplored. Graph data is inherently structured, with information distributed across nodes and edges and encoded through both topology and latent representations. As a result, effective reasoning over graphs requires not only retrieving informative evidence from the graph, but also progressively refining the accumulated context during multi-step inference. In this work, we propose GraphReAct, a graph reasoning-acting framework that enables step-by-step inference over graph-structured data. Specifically, we design a graph-based action space with two complementary retrieval actions: topological retrieval, which captures local structural dependencies, and semantic retrieval, which accesses non-local but relevant evidence in the representation space. These actions dynamically expand the reasoning context. To further support multi-step reasoning, we introduce another type of action, context refinement, which distills and reorganizes accumulated information into a compact representation. By interleaving reasoning with both retrieval and refinement actions, our framework enables a progressive transition from context expansion to compression. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate that GraphReAct consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, validating the effectiveness of reasoning-acting for graph learning.
2605.07357.paper_summary_zh: 推理-行動框架通過將推理與行動交錯來增強大型語言模型 (LLMs)，以實現動態信息獲取。<lb/>然而，將這一範式擴展到圖學習仍然未被充分探索。<lb/>圖數據本質上是結構化的，信息分佈在節點和邊上，並通過拓撲和潛在表示進行編碼。<lb/>因此，對圖進行有效推理不僅需要從圖中檢索有用的證據，還需要在多步推理過程中逐步細化累積的上下文。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了 GraphReAct，一種圖推理-行動框架，能夠對圖結構數據進行逐步推理。<lb/>具體而言，我們設計了一個基於圖的行動空間，其中包含兩個互補的檢索行動：拓撲檢索，用於捕捉局部結構依賴，和語義檢索，用於訪問表示空間中非局部但相關的證據。<lb/>這些行動動態擴展推理上下文。<lb/>為了進一步支持多步推理，我們引入了另一種類型的行動，上下文細化，該行動將累積的信息提煉並重新組織為緊湊的表示。<lb/>通過將推理與檢索和細化行動交錯，我們的框架實現了從上下文擴展到壓縮的漸進過渡。<lb/>在六個基準數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，GraphReAct 始終超越最先進的方法，驗證了推理-行動在圖學習中的有效性。
2605.07357.author: Xingtong Yu et.al.
2605.07357.authors: Xingtong Yu, Zhongwei Kuai, Chang Zhou, Xuanting Xie, Renhe Jiang, Xikun Zhang, Hong Cheng, Xinming Zhang, Yuan Fang
